explanation: The user instructs to use the dining table instead of the countertop. The old plan attempted to place the knife on the countertop, which failed. Since the user wants to switch to the dining table, I replace the failed placement step by placing the knife on the dining table. The rest of the old plan, which was not attempted, should now be executed starting from the next step (Pick_up(bowl_0)) as it was not attempted before. Thus, I continue the plan from the not-attempted steps after the successful pick-up of the knife.
